Describe the sequence of activities the girl engages in with different objects throughout the video.
canonical_answer: At 2s, a girl displays hands painted with bright colors and smiley faces; at 4s, she holds a white card with the name Giulia written in pink; at 8s, she looks down at a silver laptop screen surrounded by plush toys; at 16s, she reclines while holding a white tablet device in her left hand.
